title: In the Water
editorialSummary: Competitive swimming strokes and their key sub-terms. Four official strokes (freestyle, backstroke, breaststroke, butterfly) each have an iconic associated phrase. Groups are named by stroke; items are the four strokes themselves plus three close associates, sorted so each group of four is clearly one stroke's vocabulary. Simplified here to: the four strokes sorted by body position/arm action category.

meta.gptRationale: The swimming vocabulary is fairly concrete and familiar, though relay/start distinctions add a little sorting friction.
